elements.label: Search entities...
elements.notes: Main search box for filtering entities by name or code

elements.label: Notifications
elements.notes: Opens notifications panel for workflow-related alerts

elements.label: Tasks for me
elements.notes: Quick filter button to show entities with tasks assigned to current user

elements.label: What's for me
elements.notes: Quick filter button (functionality TBD)

elements.label: Assigned user...
elements.notes: Dropdown to filter entities by assigned user. Opens searchable list with user avatars, emails, and 'Unassigned' option

elements.label: Search...
elements.notes: Search box within assigned user dropdown (only visible when dropdown is open)

elements.label: Filters
elements.notes: Opens filters modal with advanced filtering options

elements.label: Financial Year
elements.notes: Filter by financial year (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Job Status
elements.notes: Filter by job completion status. Default value is 'All Unfinished' (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Due in...
elements.notes: Filter by due date timeframe (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Label
elements.notes: Filter by entity labels/tags (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Job Template
elements.notes: Filter by job template type (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Starts before
elements.notes: Filter by job start date. Shows current date by default (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Reset Filters
elements.notes: Clears all applied filters. Button is disabled when no filters are active (only visible in Filters modal)
Closes the filters modal (only visible in Filters modal)

elements.label: Code
elements.notes: Sortable column header for entity code

elements.label: Name
elements.notes: Sortable column header for entity name

elements.label: Labels
elements.notes: Column header for entity labels (not sortable)

elements.label: Assignees
elements.notes: Column header for assigned users (not sortable)

elements.label: Default Assignee
elements.notes: Column header for default assignee (shows info icon tooltip)

elements.label: Last task completed
elements.notes: Column header for last completed task info (not sortable)

elements.label: Jobs
elements.notes: Sortable column header for job counts
Expandable/collapsible button in each table row. Shows expand icon when collapsed, collapse icon when expanded. Reveals 'Add Job' button when expanded

elements.label: Entity Icon
elements.notes: Colored circular icon with entity initials. Different colors for different entity types

elements.label: Entity Name
elements.notes: Clickable entity name that navigates to entity details page. URL format: /s/workflow/list/{entityId}/

elements.label: Label Badge
elements.notes: Colored badges representing entity labels (e.g., '2223'). Multiple labels may appear per entity

elements.label: Assignee Avatar
elements.notes: Circular avatar with user initials (e.g., 'SP', 'YD', 'LC'). Multiple avatars shown for multiple assignees

elements.label: Unassigned
elements.notes: Shows default assignee. Displays 'U Unassigned' when no default assignee set. Clickable to assign user

elements.label: Jobs Counter
elements.notes: Displays job counts with colored badges. Red badge shows total jobs, orange shows in-progress, blue shows completed. Example: '5 1 1' means 5 total, 1 in-progress, 1 completed

elements.label: Add Job
elements.notes: Appears only when entity row is expanded. Creates new job for the entity

elements.label: Load more...
elements.notes: Loads additional entities in the table (pagination)

elements.label: WORKFLOW JOBS
elements.notes: Navigation tab to Workflow Jobs page

elements.label: WORKFLOW ENTITIES
elements.notes: Navigation tab for current page (active)

elements.label: WORKFLOW OVERVIEW
elements.notes: Navigation tab to Workflow Overview page

actions.name: Search Entities
actions.expectedOutcome: Table filters to show matching entities by name or code

actions.name: Filter by Assigned User
actions.expectedOutcome: Dropdown opens with searchable list of users. Selecting a user filters table to show only entities assigned to that user

actions.name: Apply Advanced Filters
actions.expectedOutcome: Filters modal opens. User can select multiple filter criteria. Applying filters updates the table results

actions.name: Sort Table Column
actions.expectedOutcome: Table sorts by selected column (ascending/descending toggle)

actions.name: Expand Entity Row
actions.expectedOutcome: Row expands to show 'Add Job' button. Clicking again collapses the row

actions.name: Navigate to Entity Details
actions.expectedOutcome: Navigates to entity-specific workflow details page

actions.name: Add Job to Entity
actions.expectedOutcome: Opens job creation modal/form for the selected entity

actions.name: Assign Default User
actions.expectedOutcome: Opens user assignment dialog to set default assignee for entity

actions.name: Load More Entities
actions.expectedOutcome: Loads next page of entities into the table

notes: Page displays a list of workflow entities (funds/companies) with their associated jobs and assignees
Each entity row can be expanded to reveal additional actions
Table supports sorting by Code, Name, and Jobs columns
Multiple filter options available: quick filters and advanced filters modal
Job counters use color-coded badges: red (total), orange (in-progress), blue (completed)
Entity icons are color-coded by type: orange for companies, blue for SMSF
Assignees displayed as circular avatars with initials
Default assignee shows 'U Unassigned' when not set
Search is real-time and filters entities by name or code
